name: Ty1_LTR_family
description: Ty1 retrotransposon family in S. cerevisiae. Full-length Ty1 elements are 5.9 kb with 334 bp LTRs ('delta' LTRs). S288C carries 32 full-length Ty1 elements and ~280 solo Ty1 delta LTRs scattered genome-wide, mostly upstream of Pol III genes. Element copy number is strain-dependent and shifts under stress.

architecture.internal_structure: 5'LTR (334 bp) - gag-pol ORFs - 3'LTR; solo LTRs are recombination products of intra-element exchange

expected_copy_count: ~32 full-length elements + ~280 solo LTRs per haploid S288C genome; strain-variable
